debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝³ : DecidableEq α
inst✝² : MeasurableSingletonClass α
alg✝ : Algorithm α ℝ
ν✝ : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝¹ : IsMarkovKernel ν✝
alg : Algorithm α ℝ
ν : Kernel α ℝ
inst✝ : IsMarkovKernel ν
a : α
n : ℕ
⊢ IndepFun (rewardByCount a (n + 1)) (fun ω i => rewardByCount a (↑i) ω) (Bandit.measure alg✝ ν✝)

failed_attempts: simpa [Iic] using indepFun_rewardByCount_succ_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a n

classical
  have h :
      IndepFun (rewardByCount a (n + 1)) id 𝔓 := by
    simpa using (indepFun_rewardByCount_id (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a (n + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero n))
  have hmeas : Measurable (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount a i ω) := by
    fun_prop
  simpa [IndepFun] using h.comp measurable_id hmeas

classical
  -- `rewardByCount a (n+1)` is measurable w.r.t. the σ-algebra generated by `ω.2 (n+1) a`,
  -- while `fun i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount a i` is measurable w.r.t. the σ-algebra generated by
  -- `ω.2 i a` for `i ≤ n`; those coordinates are independent in the product measure `𝔓`.
  simpa [Bandit.measure, Bandit.trajMeasure, Bandit.streamMeasure, rewardByCount, 𝔓] using
    (indepFun_fst_snd (μ := Bandit.trajMeasure alg ν))

classical
  simpa using indepFun_rewardByCount_succ_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a n

simpa [IndepFun] using
    (indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n))

simpa [IndepFun, indepFun_iff_indepSets_preimage] using
    (indepFun_rewardByCount_succ_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n))

classical
  simpa [indepFun_iff_condIndepFun_const] using
    condIndepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n)
simpa using (indepFun_rewardByCount_succ_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n))

simpa [IndepFun, indepFun_iff] using
    (Bandit.indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a n)

classical
  -- `rewardByCount a (n+1)` is the reward at a random time `stepsUntil a (n+1)`.
  -- Rewards at distinct times are independent; the collection of rewards indexed by `Iic n`
  -- depends only on the first `n` rewards of arm `a`, hence is independent of the `(n+1)`-th.
  -- We transport this from the underlying i.i.d. stream of rewards for arm `a`.
  have h_id :
      IdentDistrib (rewardByCount a (n + 1)) id 𝔓 (ν a) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_id (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a (n + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero n)
  have h_eval :
      IdentDistrib (rewardByCount a (n + 1)) (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ ω (n + 1) a) 𝔓
        (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a (n + 1) (n + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero n)
  have h_vec :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount a i ω)
        (fun ω i : Iic n ↦ ω (i : ℕ) a) 𝔓 (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    refine IdentDistrib.pi ?_ ?_ ?_
    · intro i; fun_prop
    · intro i; fun_prop
    · intro i
      simpa using
        identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a (i : ℕ) (i : ℕ)
          (Nat.pos_of_mem_Iic i.property).ne'
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ ω (n + 1) a) (fun ω i : Iic n ↦ ω (i : ℕ) a)
        (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    -- independence of coordinates in the product measure
    simpa [Bandit.streamMeasure] using
      (indepFun_eval_eval_infinitePi (ν := fun _ : ℕ ↦ Measure.infinitePi ν) (i := n + 1)
        (j := fun i : Iic n ↦ (i : ℕ)) (by
          intro i
          exact (lt_of_le_of_lt i.property (Nat.lt_succ_self n)).ne') .mono
        (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)
  exact (h_eval.indepFun_iff.2 <| h_indep_stream).trans_identDistrib_right h_vec

simpa using
    indepFun_rewardByCount_succ_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n)

simpa [Bandit.measure] using
    (Bandit.indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a n)
simpa using indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n)

simpa using
    indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n)
simpa using indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n)

classical
  simpa [indepFun_iff_condIndepFun] using
    (condIndepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n))

simpa [IndepFun] using
    (Bandit.indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a n)

classical
  have h_indep :
      IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a)
        (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω.2 (i : ℕ) a) 𝔓 := by
    simpa [Bandit.measure, Bandit.streamMeasure, 𝔓] using
      (indepFun_snd_eval_Iic (μ := Bandit.trajMeasure alg ν) (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n))
  have h_id :
      (rewardByCount a (n + 1)) =ᵐ[𝔓] fun ω ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a := by
    refine ae_of_all _ ?_
    intro ω
    simp [rewardByCount]
  have h_id' :
      (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount a i ω) =ᵐ[𝔓] fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω.2 (i : ℕ) a := by
    refine ae_of_all _ ?_
    intro ω
    ext i
    simp [rewardByCount]
  exact h_indep.ae_eq h_id h_id'

classical
  refine indepFun_of_forall_finset_indepFun ?_
  intro s
  classical
  simpa [IndepFun] using (indepFun_rewardByCount_finset (alg := alg) (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n + 1) s)

classical
  have h_id :
      IdentDistrib (rewardByCount a (n + 1))
        (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ ω (n + 1) a) 𝔓 (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
    identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a (n + 1) (n + 1) (Nat.succ_ne_zero _)
  have h_vec :
      IdentDistrib (fun ω i : Iic n ↦ rewardByCount a i ω)
        (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω (i : ℕ) a) 𝔓 (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    refine IdentDistrib.pi (fun i ↦ ?_)
    simpa using
      (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a (i : ℕ) (i : ℕ)
        (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero i.2).ne')
  have h_indep_stream :
      IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ ω (n + 1) a)
        (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω (i : ℕ) a) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
    have h_all :
        IndepFun (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ ω (n + 1) a)
          (fun ω : ℕ → α → ℝ ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω i a) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
      simpa using
        (indepFun_eval_eval_streamMeasure (ν := ν) (a := a) (i := n + 1) (s := Iic n)
          (by
            intro j hj
            exact (Nat.succ_ne_self _).ne' ▸ (Nat.succ_ne_self _).ne' ▸ (Nat.succ_ne_self _).ne'
              |>.elim))
    simpa using h_all
  exact h_indep_stream.comp_identDistrib h_id.symm h_vec.symm

classical
  simpa using indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n)

classical
  -- `rewardByCount a (n+1)` is a function of `ω.2 (n+1) a`, while the vector of previous rewards
  -- is a function of `ω.2` restricted to coordinates `≤ n`; those are independent under the stream measure.
  simpa [Bandit.measure, Bandit.trajMeasure] using
    (indepFun_eval_eval_Iic_streamMeasure (ν := ν) (m := n + 1) (a := a) (n := n)).comp
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

classical
  simpa using (indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a n)

classical
  -- `rewardByCount a (n+1)` is `ω.2 (n+1) a` and does not depend on `ω.1`;
  -- the vector `(fun i ≤ n ↦ rewardByCount a i)` depends only on `ω.1`.
  -- Under `Bandit.measure`, the two coordinates are independent.
  simpa [rewardByCount, Bandit.measure, Measure.fst, Measure.snd] using
    (indepFun_fst_snd (μ := Bandit.trajMeasure alg ν) (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)).comp
      (f := fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a)
      (g := fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ fun i : Iic n ↦ ω.1 (stepsUntil a (i : ℕ) ω.1) |>.2)
      (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

classical
  by_cases ha : (𝔓).map (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1) {⊤} = 1
  · have htop : (rewardByCount a (n + 1)) =ᵐ[𝔓] fun ω ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a := by
      refine ae_of_all _ (fun ω ↦ ?_)
      by_cases h : stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1 = ⊤
      · simpa [rewardByCount, h]
      · have : 𝔓 ((fun ω ↦ stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1) ⁻¹' {⊤}) = 0 := by
          have hm : 𝔓 ((fun ω ↦ stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1) ⁻¹' {⊤}) =
              (𝔓).map (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1) {⊤} := by
            symm
            exact Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_singleton _)
          have : (𝔓).map (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1) {⊤} = 0 := by
            have hprob : (𝔓).map (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1) {⊤} ≤ 1 := by
              simpa using (measure_le_one (μ := (𝔓).map (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1)) _)
            have : (𝔓).map (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1) {⊤} = 1 := ha
            exact by
              simpa [this] using (sub_eq_zero.mp (by
                have : (1:ℝ≥0∞) - (𝔓).map (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1) {⊤} = 0 := by
                  simp [ha]
                exact this))
          simpa [hm, this]
        exfalso
        exact h (by
          have : ω ∈ (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1) ⁻¹' {⊤} := by
            simpa [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_singleton_iff]
          have hnull : (𝔓) ((fun ω ↦ stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1) ⁻¹' {⊤}) = 0 := by
            have hm' :
                (𝔓) ((fun ω ↦ stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1) ⁻¹' {⊤}) =
                  (𝔓).map (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1) {⊤} := by
              exact (Measure.map_apply (by fun_prop) (measurableSet_singleton _)).symm
            simp [hm', ha]
          have : ω ∈ (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1) ⁻¹' {⊤} := this
          exact by
            classical
            have : (fun ω ↦ stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1) ω = ⊤ := by
              simpa [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_singleton_iff] using this
            simpa [this])
  ·
    have h_indep :
        IndepFun (fun ω : (ℕ → α × ℝ) × (ℕ → α → ℝ) ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a)
          (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω.2 i a) 𝔓 := by
      simpa [Bandit.measure, Bandit.streamMeasure] using
        (indepFun_eval_eval_prod_measure (μ := Bandit.trajMeasure alg ν)
          (ν := Bandit.streamMeasure ν) (m := n + 1) (a := a) (n := n))
    refine h_indep.congr ?_ rfl
    ·
      have h1 :
          rewardByCount a (n + 1) =ᵐ[𝔓] fun ω ↦ ω.2 (n + 1) a := by
        refine ae_of_all _ (fun ω ↦ ?_)
        by_cases h : stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1 = ⊤
        · simpa [rewardByCount, h]
        · have : stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1 = (stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1).getD (n + 1) := by
            cases h' : stepsUntil a (n + 1) ω.1 using ENat.recTopCoe <;> simp [h', ENat.getD]
          simp [rewardByCount, h, this]
      exact h1

classical
  by_cases hn : n = 0
  · subst hn
    simp [Iic, indepFun_const_right]
  ·
    have hn' : n + 1 ≠ 0 := Nat.succ_ne_zero n
    have h_ident :
        IdentDistrib (rewardByCount a (n + 1)) (fun ω ↦ ω (n + 1) a) 𝔓 (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) :=
      identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a (n + 1) (n + 1) hn'
    have h_ident' :
        IdentDistrib (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ rewardByCount a i ω) (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω i a) 𝔓
          (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
      refine IdentDistrib.pi fun i ↦ ?_
      have hi0 : (i : ℕ) ≠ 0 := by
        have : (1 : ℕ) ≤ (i : ℕ) := by
          have : (0 : ℕ) < (i : ℕ) := by
            have : (i : ℕ) ≤ n := i.property
            have hn0 : 0 < n := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn
            exact lt_of_lt_of_le hn0 this
          exact Nat.succ_le_iff.mp this
        exact ne_of_gt (lt_of_lt_of_le (Nat.succ_pos 0) this)
      simpa using (identDistrib_rewardByCount_eval (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a (i : ℕ) (i : ℕ) hi0)
    have h_indep_stream :
        IndepFun (fun ω ↦ ω (n + 1) a) (fun ω (i : Iic n) ↦ ω i a) (Bandit.streamMeasure ν) := by
      simpa using (indepFun_eval_lt (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n + 1))
    exact (h_ident.indepFun_iff.2 ((h_ident'.symm.indepFun_iff.1 h_indep_stream))).symm

classical
  simpa using
    (indepFun_rewardByCount_succ_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n))

classical
  simpa [IndepFun, indepFun_iff_condDistrib_eq, Finset.indicator] using
    (indepFun_rewardByCount_succ_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a n)
simpa using (Bandit.indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) a n)

simpa using
    (Bandit.indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n))

classical
  simpa [IndepFun] using
    (Bandit.indepFun_rewardByCount_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n))
simpa using (indepFun_rewardByCount_succ_Iic (alg := alg) (ν := ν) (a := a) (n := n))
